title: tissa gracilis
side_effects: Tissa gracilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its high levels of toxic compounds like glycosides and alkaloids. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may also lead to cardiovascular problems, including hypertension and arrhythmias. In rare cases, improper use of tissa gracilis can cause allergic reactions, such as hives and itching, in sensitive individuals. Furthermore, its improper use may also interact with certain medications, leading to adverse effects like increased bleeding risk or decreased effectiveness of prescribed treatments.
